title: Builder
subtitle: Hire agents, build teams, and create skills. Your Secretary handles the entire process — from sourcing to onboarding.

prompts.hireAgentDesc: Hire from templates, create custom agents, or find specialists on Markus Hub
hireAgentExamples: Find a DevOps specialist on Hub
prompts.hireAgentPrompt: I need to hire an agent:
prompts.buildTeamDesc: Compose an optimal team for your project or deploy a team template
buildTeamExamples: A web dev team with PM, devs, and QA
prompts.buildTeamPrompt: I need to build a team for:
prompts.createSkillDesc: Design new capabilities that agents can learn and use

myCreations.title: My Creations
myCreations.subtitle: Saved builder artifacts — install to deploy, or share to Markus Hub.
myCreations.noArtifactsHint: Use a builder above to create agents, teams, or skills.

removeFromHub: Remove "{{name}}" from Markus Hub? It will no longer be available for others to download.
